topic: The hallway to my bedroom gets longer at night
title: The Hallway in My House Gets Longer at Night | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: The hallway to my bedroom is twenty feet by day. At night it takes a full minute to walk.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot down a dim residential hallway toward a closed bedroom door at the far end, warm low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Single story house. Bedroom at the end of one hallway. Lived here six years.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a single story house interior, a hallway leading off the living room, dim evening light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Five seconds, day or night. Always was.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of bare feet on a hallway runner rug, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: One night the walk felt long. My bedroom door stayed far away.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot down a hallway that appears unnaturally long, the far door small in the distance, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing
wide low shot of a long dim hallway receding into shadow, the floor stretching away, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Forty steps at night. Twelve in the morning.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a hallway in daylight, short and ordinary, a bedroom door close at the end, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I left a chair halfway down.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a wooden chair placed halfway down a dim hallway, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: At night I passed it at step thirty. It should be step six.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a long dark hallway with a small chair far in the distance, the bedroom door even farther, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The hallway grows after midnight. The far door shrinks to a dot of light.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot down an elongated hallway at night, the far door reduced to a tiny point of light, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Last night I walked for ten minutes and never reached my room.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of an impossibly long dark corridor stretching into blackness, faint light at the unreachable end, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I sleep on the couch now, by the front door.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a person sleeping on a living room couch near a front door, dim lamp light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Some nights I hear my bedroom door open. Far away. Something is coming back up the hall.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot down a long dark hallway at night with a faint open door far away and a dim shape emerging, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing
